creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 201830
port patch

- update www/ufdbguard to 1.34.1:
  + support OpenSSL 1.1.x
  + implement 'execiplist' keyword for sources
  + squid-uses-active-bumping can be a category-specific option
  + support for |.example.com to match a URL with top domain "example.com" and  with subdomain www[0-9]{0,2} or no subdomain
  + updated manual
- Make it possible to build with libressl
